---
title: "Warum Open Source"
title-block-style: none
description: "Vergleichen Sie Open-Source-Infrastruktur mit proprietaren Alternativen. Echte Unterschiede bei Kosten, Kontrolle, Sicherheit und EU-Konformitat."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Warum Open Source?</h1>
    <p>Vergleichen Sie Open-Source-Infrastruktur mit proprietaren Alternativen. Echte Unterschiede, kein Marketing.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- VERGLEICHSTABELLE -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:900px;">
    <h2>Open Source vs. Proprietar</h2>
    <p class="sub">Ein praktischer Vergleich fur europaische Organisationen.</p>

    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr; gap:0; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.15);">
      <!-- Kopfzeile -->
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1.5rem; font-weight:700; font-size:0.8rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#86868b;"></div>
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1rem; text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; color:#81BD4A;">Open Source</div>
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1rem; text-align:center; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; color:#86868b;">Proprietary</div>

      <!-- Zeilen -->
      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Lizenzkosten</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Kostenlos</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Pro Nutzer/Monat</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Datenstandort</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Sie wahlen (EU)</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Anbieter entscheidet</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Anbieterabhangigkeit</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Keine</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Erheblich</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Zugang zum Quellcode</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Vollstandig</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Geschlossen</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">DSGVO-Konformitat</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Von Grund auf</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Anbieterabhangig</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Sicherheitsaudits</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Community + Sie</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Nur der Anbieter</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Anpassung</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Unbegrenzt</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Vom Anbieter begrenzt</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Exit-Strategie</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Ihre Daten, Ihr Format</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Schmerzhafte Migration</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ECHTE ALTERNATIVEN -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Was ersetzt was</h2>
    <p class="sub">Produktionsreife Open-Source-Alternativen, die Sie heute einsetzen konnen.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Microsoft 365</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Nextcloud + Collabora</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Dateien, E-Mail, Kalender, Kontakte, Echtzeit-Dokumentenbearbeitung. Selbst gehostet, Daten in der EU.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Azure AD</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Keycloak + FreeIPA</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">SSO, MFA, LDAP-Verzeichnis, foderierte Identitat. Enterprise-Niveau, null Lizenzkosten.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Slack / Teams</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Matrix / Mattermost</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Verschlusselte Nachrichten, Federation, Kanale, Threads. Volle Kontrolle uber Ihre Daten.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Zoom</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Jitsi Meet</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Browserbasiertes Video, keine Konten erforderlich. Bildschirmfreigabe, Aufnahme, Breakout-Raume.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Datadog / Splunk</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Prometheus + Grafana</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Metriken, Dashboards, Alarme. Skalierbar von 5 bis 5.000 Servern.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Windows Server</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">NixOS / Debian</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Deklarative, reproduzierbare Server. Keine Pro-Server-Lizenzierung.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EINSPARUNGEN -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Kosteneinsparungen"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Erhebliche Einsparungen.<br>40-70% Kostenreduktion.</h2>
        <p>Kommerzielle SaaS-Lizenzkosten steigen schnell, wenn Ihr Team wachst. Die Open-Source-Alternative (Nextcloud, Keycloak, Matrix, Jitsi) kostet null an Lizenzen — Sie zahlen nur fur Hosting und Verwaltung.</p>
        <p>Selbst mit professionellen Managed Services von chen.ist sparen die meisten Organisationen erheblich gegenuber kommerziellen SaaS-Lizenzen. <a href="/de/booking/" class="m-lk" style="font-size:inherit;">Erhalten Sie eine personliche Schatzung</a>.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/de/digital/" class="m-lk">Unsere Infrastrukturdienste</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EU-STATISTIKEN -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">0</div><div class="m-nl">Pro-Nutzer-Gebuhren</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Daten bleiben hier</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Code auditierbar</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">40-70%</div><div class="m-nl">Kosteneinsparungen</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Bereit, die Kontrolle uber<br>Ihre Infrastruktur zu ubernehmen?</h2>
    <p>Kostenlose 30-Minuten-Beratung. Wir analysieren Ihren aktuellen Stack und zeigen Ihnen, was moglich ist.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/de/booking/" class="m-b">Beratung buchen</a>
      <a href="/de/digital/" class="m-bo">Unsere Dienste</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
